question:
I'm new to this codebase and need a real code-based tour before my first behavior change.

Find the central runtime flow, trace it from the public API to the code that does the work, and show the nearby code paths and tests I should read next.

shellCommands: "C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command 'rg -n "const onChange =|const onExport =|const renderCustomStats =|const ExcalidrawWrapper =|const ExcalidrawApp =|export default ExcalidrawApp" excalidraw-app/App.tsx'

"C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command "rg -n \"private initializeScene =|public async componentDidMount|public componentWillUnmount|public updateScene =|public render\\(\" packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx"

"C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command 'rg -n "export const ExcalidrawAPIProvider|const ExcalidrawBase|export const Excalidraw =|InitializeApp" packages/excalidraw/index.tsx packages/excalidraw/components/InitializeApp.tsx'
graph.answer:
The actual boot path in this repo is `excalidraw-app`, and the editor work starts only after that shell hands off into the package API.

**Runtime Flow**
- Browser entrypoint: [excalidraw-app/index.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/excalidraw-app/index.tsx#L1) creates the React root, registers the PWA service worker, and renders `<ExcalidrawApp />`.
- App shell: [excalidraw-app/App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/excalidraw-app/App.tsx#L1264) wraps the app in error handling and state providers, then mounts [ExcalidrawWrapper](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/excalidraw-app/App.tsx#L373).
- Bridge to the editor: [excalidraw-app/App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/excalidraw-app/App.tsx#L910) is where the shell renders the package’s public `<Excalidraw />` component, passing `onChange`, `onExport`, collaboration, theme, and UI hooks.
- Public package API: [packages/excalidraw/index.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/index.tsx#L52) exposes `ExcalidrawAPIProvider`, and [packages/excalidraw/index.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/index.tsx#L67) defines `ExcalidrawBase`; the exported memoized component is at [packages/excalidraw/index.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/index.tsx#L310).
- Startup gate: [packages/excalidraw/components/InitializeApp.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/InitializeApp.tsx#L17) waits for language setup before rendering the editor.
- Core workhorse: [packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx#L792) builds the imperative API object, [packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx#L2950) loads initial scene data, [packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx#L3183) wires listeners and kicks initialization, [packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx#L4717) batches scene updates, and [packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx#L2139) renders the context tree and UI.

**What To Read Next**
- [packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx#L2950) and [packages/excalidraw/data/restore.ts](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/data/restore.ts#L817) if your change touches initial scene loading or state normalization.
- [excalidraw-app/App.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/excalidraw-app/App.tsx#L215) and [excalidraw-app/data/LocalData.ts](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/excalidraw-app/data/LocalData.ts) if you care about local persistence, URL imports, or restoring from storage.
- [excalidraw-app/collab/Collab.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/excalidraw-app/collab/Collab.tsx#L132) if you are changing collaboration, remote sync, or update batching.
- [packages/excalidraw/data/library.ts](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/data/library.ts) if the behavior touches library imports, inserts, or sidebar state.
- [packages/excalidraw/tests/App.test.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/App.test.tsx#L12) for the public `<Excalidraw />` startup path.
- [packages/excalidraw/tests/export.test.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/export.test.tsx#L49) for export/import serialization behavior.
- [packages/excalidraw/tests/library.test.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/library.test.tsx#L52) for initial library loading and insert semantics.
- [excalidraw-app/tests/collab.test.tsx](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/excalidraw-app/tests/collab.test.tsx#L63) for the app-shell collaboration/update path.

If you want, I can turn this into a narrower “first behavior change” map next, e.g. “where to edit if I want to change startup, persistence, export, or collaboration.”
